message:
ci: bump path-deps to rulake 2.3.0-alpha.1 + add kernel-{avx512,wgpu} to matrix

Iter 49 bumped root rulake to 2.3.0-alpha.1; iter 51 only fixed
mcp-server's path-dep. The 6 remaining sibling crates still pinned
'rulake = 2.2' (cargo refuses pre-release matches via plain ^).
Every CI run since iter 49 had been failing on these.

Sweep: bump pin in mcp-rvdna, mcp-ruqu, rvdna-backend, ruqu-backend
(plain string form) + gcs-backend, ipfs-backend (struct form with
path).

Plus add kernel-avx512 and kernel-wgpu (issue #3) to the CI matrix
so they get build+test coverage on every PR.

files.patch:
@@ -35,6 +35,8 @@ jobs:
           - "ipfs-backend"
           - "rvdna-backend"
           - "ruqu-backend"
+          - "kernel-avx512"   # ADR-157 SIMD reference impl (issue #3)
+          - "kernel-wgpu"     # ADR-157 portable GPU impl (issue #3)
           - "python"
           - "node"
     steps:

@@ -23,7 +23,7 @@ repository = "https://github.com/ruvnet/RuLake"
 description = "GCS Parquet BackendAdapter for ruLake (ADR-155 §M2)"
 
 [dependencies]
-rulake = { path = "..", version = "2.2.0" }
+rulake = { path = "..", version = "2.3.0-alpha.1" }
 
 # Unified storage abstraction. The `gcp` feature pulls in the GCS
 # transport (which honours gcloud Application Default Credentials).

@@ -22,7 +22,7 @@ repository = "https://github.com/ruvnet/RuLake"
 description = "IPFS BackendAdapter for ruLake — bundle distribution + content addressing (ADR-005)"
 
 [dependencies]
-rulake = { path = "..", version = "2.2.0" }
+rulake = { path = "..", version = "2.3.0-alpha.1" }
 
 # Note: we deliberately don't use `ipfs-api-backend-hyper` for v0.1.
 # It transitively pulls multihash 0.17 → core2 0.4 (yanked). Kubo's

-version = "0.1.0"

  "hex",

  "rulake",
  "serde",

@@ -54,7 +54,7 @@ ruvector-rulake-ruqu = { path = "../ruqu-backend" }
 # ruLake itself — needed for `RuLake::search_one` (the cache short-
 # circuit `ruqu_replay` rides on) and for `RuLakeBundle` / witness
 # byte-equality semantics. Match the version mcp-server pins.
-rulake = "2.2"
+rulake = "2.3.0-alpha.1"
 
 # Official Rust MCP SDK. Same feature set mcp-server / mcp-rvdna use,
 # now including `transport-streamable-http-server` for the v0.1 HTTP

@@ -39,7 +39,7 @@ path = "src/main.rs"
 [dependencies]
 # The rulake crate carries `RuLakeBundle` + `BackendAdapter` — same
 # version mcp-server pins.
-rulake = "2.2"
+rulake = "2.3.0-alpha.1"
 # Path-dep on the sibling rvdna-backend crate; flip to crates.io when
 # rvdna-backend is published.
 ruvector-rulake-rvdna = { path = "../rvdna-backend" }

@@ -44,7 +44,7 @@ description = "ruQu v2 BackendAdapter for ruLake — quantum execution substrate

 [dependencies]
-rulake = "2.2"

 serde_json = "1.0"

@@ -33,7 +33,7 @@ description = "rvDNA v2 BackendAdapter for ruLake — genomic substrate, T0 hot-
